title: Aberdeen Cold Snap
lead: Aberdeen is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.23. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Aberdeen are extremely cold, with a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 82% and the wind speed is 10.4 km/h, making the situation even more uncomfortable. 
 The HDD value is 12.3 GG, indicating a high energy consumption for heating, while the CDD value is 0.0 GG, showing no need for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
